## Findings
- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] internal/tui coverage is 58.9%**
  - **Status quo:** `internal/tui` package line coverage is 58.9%, below the 80% default threshold.
  - **Likely cause:** TUI code is tightly coupled to bubbletea I/O and terminal interactions; many paths require interactive terminal state.
  - **Proposed solution:** Evaluate whether TUI I/O boundaries can be abstracted for unit tests, or accept the architectural constraint. No regression from this release.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage .github/coverage/2026-07-01T13:42:37Z.md` → `/03-gh-go` (if planning coverage work)

- [ ] **[WARN][Coverage] internal/pathutil coverage is 76.5%**
  - **Status quo:** `internal/pathutil` package line coverage is 76.5%, just below the 80% default threshold.
  - **Likely cause:** Edge-case symlink and error paths are not exercised by current tests.
  - **Proposed solution:** Add tests for symlink error branches and unusual path edge cases.
  - **Handoff:** `/test-coverage` → `/02-gh-plan --from-coverage .github/coverage/2026-07-01T13:42:37Z.md` → `/03-gh-go` (if planning coverage work)
